title: Classification legend panel showing all Queens Campus class codes and colors
capture_instructions: Close-up crop of the classification legend panel in the bottom-right corner of the viewport while Classification mode is active. All 17 class entries should be legible: class code, color swatch, and label name. Crop to roughly 320x440px showing just the legend panel.
